name: Example Community Commitments
description: Optional: your school's stated values / community commitments. Surfaced in Celebrate flows so leaders can recognize staff in line with values.

commitments.personal: I commit to my own and others' development.
commitments.collective: We give and seek feedback to grow together.

commitments.personal: I commit to putting students at the center of every decision.
commitments.collective: Every choice we make is anchored in what is best for kids.
behaviors: Plan with students in mind, not adult convenience.
Hold high expectations for every child.
Build relationships that make students feel seen.
